texto: The diet is a twisted, noxious thing, all tortured abstinence and short-term fraud. I speak from bitter experience. As a restaurant critic, I eat to live and live to eat. And having a toxic aversion to exercise, there is little to prevent the inevitable bulging of my gut. Hence the need for the occasional diet.
explicacao: Citação de Tom Parker Bowles sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The diet is a twisted, noxious thing, all tortured abstinence and short-term fraud. I speak from …” articula vida, speak, exercise em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como exercise e diet.
